name: Christmas Set of 4 Mini Swag Red Berries and Red Bow - Wondershop™
description:
Bring a touch of colorful woodland to your decor with this Set of Four Mini Swag Red Berries and Red Bow from Wondershop™. Made from polyethylene faux pine swag and berries, each is accented with red velvet bows and finished with a gold-toned hanging loop for easy decorating. Versatile and beautiful, you can hang them on the wall, doors or mantlepiece for that extra touch of holiday joy.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
